title: Infinty Club | MBA IB DSE
description:
This cell exists for the love of marketing. Marketing enthusiasts from both the batches make up this cell. All in all they conduct competitions around marketing and keep everyone informed about the latest in marketing with their updates.
DSE MBA IB | University of Delhi | MIB | Since 1995
headings: To know more, connect with them
paragraphs: Team Infinity, the Analytics Club of DSE, is dedicated to empowering students by delivering comprehensive education in data analytics, enabling them to build successful careers in the corporate sector. Our core mission revolves around equipping students with the crucial data analytics skills that are in high demand in today's professional landscape. Furthermore, we are committed to establishing a network of data analytics professionals who can serve as valuable mentors and advisors to our studeTeam Infinity, the Analytics Club of DSE, is dedicated to empowering students by delivering comprehensive education in data analytics, enabling them to build successful careers in the corporate sector. Our core mission revolves around equipping students with the crucial data analytics skills that are in high demand in today's professional landscape. Furthermore, we are committed to establishing a network of data analytics professionals who can serve as valuable mentors and advisors to our students.nts.
It is a dashboard competition in association with Synergy.
The candidates have to register for the competition on unstop.com.
There will be cash prizes for the winners.

It is open for all case study competitions which sees national participation. Students pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate degrees from various streams come together to compete and club their innovative ideas to solve the various rounds.
It is a case study competition in association with any partner
This is a MarCom initiative where students from Delhi School of Economics choose and represent their depiction of a brand creatively. The most innovative picture wins the award.
